scene_title: Orwell e Daniel — Face Split Profético
narrative_beat: Fusão visual: rosto de Orwell lado esquerdo em tons P&B frios e rosto de Daniel profeta lado direito em tons dourados quentes, olhos de ambos convergindo para o centro em estado de choque

style_reference.textual_description: split-tone cinematic portrait, left half desaturated cold black-and-white, right half warm golden biblical tones, central dividing glow, 35mm grain, prophetic atmosphere

subject.primary: LEFT HALF: photorealistic George Orwell — gaunt face, sunken eyes, mustache — in cold desaturated black-and-white tones, expression of dread and prophecy — occupying left 40% of frame
subject.focal_point: both pairs of eyes converging toward center of frame — communicating shared vision across time
subject.secondary: RIGHT HALF: photorealistic ancient Hebrew prophet Daniel — dark beard, robes — in warm golden tones, expression of identical shock and revelation — occupying right 40% of frame
props: thin vertical crimson dividing glow at exact center
surveillance cameras very blurred in far background center

environment.location: abstract dark void background — left background: 1940s propaganda posters blurred — right background: ancient Babylonian stone walls blurred
environment.atmosphere: two men 2500 years apart seeing the same truth

composition.rule: bilateral symmetry — two faces mirroring each other across center divide
composition.foreground: left: Orwell in cold B&W — right: Daniel in warm gold — both occupying 80% of frame total
composition.midground: thin crimson/gold vertical light glow at exact center of frame
composition.background: dark and blurred on both sides — center 20% intentionally compressed as dividing space
composition.safe_zone_for_overlay: bottom 25% — dark strip for title text overlay

lighting.key_light: LEFT: hard cold top-down light on Orwell, gray and silver tones — RIGHT: warm divine golden light from upper right on Daniel
lighting.rim_light: central crimson glow rim-lighting inner edges of both faces
lighting.mood: prophetic mirror — two prophets one truth

style.film_stock: split-tone: Kodak TMax400 (left) + Kodak Portra 800 pushed (right)
style.post_processing: LEFT: desaturated monochrome with slight blue-gray tint — RIGHT: warm amber-gold tones — central glowing dividing line in crimson — dark vignette edges
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain throughout, floating ash embers, dust motes

mood.emotion: prophetic convergence, timeless shock, two voices one warning
mood.tension: very high — the two men recognize each other across millennia

symbolism.primary: Orwell and Daniel saw the same system — separated by 2500 years
symbolism.secondary: the crimson dividing glow = the thread of prophecy connecting them

negative_as_positive: photorealistic faces — not illustrated, not painted, not cartoon
both faces must show genuine shock or awe — not neutral or peaceful
LEFT face MUST be cold desaturated monochrome — RIGHT face MUST be warm golden tones
no text, no logos, no watermarks in image
bottom strip must be dark and clean for text overlay

in_scene_text.note: Title text will be added bottom strip in post-production

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer atmosphere and grain. Apply split-tone: left half cold B&W, right half warm gold.
